narrative:
Darke County has 33,863 registered voters, with 53.7% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 38.5% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 7.8%, a pronounced Republican lean of 30.7 percentage points. Baby Boomers are the largest generational cohort at 29.6% of registrants. Registration is trending bluer in younger age cohorts (1990s–2000s births lean -17.2% D−R vs -37.0% for 1950s–60s cohorts).
